description_long: This sconce features a triangular metal frame suspended from a long, slender rod, with three downward-hanging elements attached at each corner. At the center of the triangle, a circular decorative element, possibly a bulb or gem, is prominently displayed. The hanging elements appear to be metallic blades or stylized pendants, each accented with a deep red, gem-like ornament at the top. The overall structure is minimalist yet striking, with a combination of dark metallic and vibrant red tones. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for modern or industrial urban environments. The sconce is intended to be mounted from above, likely on a ceiling, and provides both illumination and visual interest.
description: A triangular metal sconce with three hanging blade-like pendants and a central circular accent, featuring dark metal and red decorative elements. The design is minimalist and modern, suspended from a long rod.
description_view_0: Front view showing the triangular frame, central circular accent, and all three hanging pendants with red tops clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sconce, with the pendants aligned and the central accent partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the triangular frame, central accent, and three pendants from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and alignment of the pendants.
attribute_fixture_design: Modern industrial design with a geometric triangular frame and minimalist hanging pendants accented by red decorative elements. The style is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors.
